title_zh: 新研究展示了我们的医疗人工智能AMIE如何助力健康管理
title_en: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions
summary_zh: 《自然》杂志发表的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理上与初级保健医生表现不相上下。
summary_en: Research published in "Nature" demonstrates that our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in managing complex diseases.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究的重要性在于表明人工智能可以在医疗健康领域提供与专业医生相媲美的支持，提升疾病管理效率和患者关怀水平。
why_it_matters_en: The significance of this research lies in showing that AI can provide support comparable to professional physicians in healthcare, enhancing disease management efficiency and patient care quality.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: New Research Shows How AMIE, Our Medical AI, Could Help Manage Health Conditions. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚的新社区投资支持本地就业并扩大能源可负担性
title_en: Our New Community Investments in Virginia Support Local Jobs and Expand Energy Affordability
summary_zh: 我们正在帮助建设该州的下一代劳动力，并投资于能源项目。
summary_en: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些投资不仅促进了就业，还帮助提升了能源的可负担性，推动社区的可持续发展。
why_it_matters_en: These investments not only promote jobs but also enhance energy affordability, driving sustainable community growth.

summary_en: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些更新展示了谷歌在人工智能领域的最新进展，反映出AI技术在实际应用中的不断提升。

title_zh: MolmoMotion：基于语言指导的3D动作预测
summary_zh: MolmoMotion是一种基于语言提示的最新技术，能够预测三维空间中的动作轨迹。该方法结合自然语言和3D动作数据，提升了动作预测的准确性和多样性。
summary_en: MolmoMotion is a novel technique that uses language prompts to forecast 3D motion trajectories. By integrating natural language with 3D motion data, it improves accuracy and diversity in action prediction.
why_it_matters_zh: MolmoMotion利用语言和动作的结合，为机器人和虚拟现实等领域提供更智能的动作理解与生成能力，推动了多模态AI的应用发展。
why_it_matters_en: By combining language with motion data, MolmoMotion enables smarter action understanding and generation in fields like robotics and virtual reality, advancing multimodal AI applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: MolmoMotion: Language-guided 3D motion forecasting. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 从Hugging Face Hub到机器人硬件：Strands Agents与LeRobot
title_en: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot
summary_zh: Hugging Face介绍了Strands Agents和LeRobot，展示如何将Hugging Face Hub上的模型应用于机器人硬件，实现智能机器人功能。
summary_en: Hugging Face introduced Strands Agents and LeRobot, demonstrating how models from the Hugging Face Hub can be applied to robot hardware to enable intelligent robot capabilities.
why_it_matters_zh: 这体现了AI模型从云端到物理设备的实际应用，推动机器人技术发展。
why_it_matters_en: This showcases the practical application of AI models from the cloud to physical devices, advancing robotics technology.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: From the Hugging Face Hub to robot hardware with Strands Agents and LeRobot. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

summary_zh: Hugging Face 博客介绍了GLM-5.2模型，该模型专注于处理长期任务，提升了在复杂和跨长时间跨度问题上的表现能力。
summary_en: The Hugging Face blog presents GLM-5.2, a model designed specifically for long-horizon tasks, enhancing its ability to handle complex problems spanning extended timeframes.
why_it_matters_zh: GLM-5.2的发布针对长期任务的需求，优化了模型在处理跨越较长时间范围的复杂任务时的效果，满足了实际应用中对连续性和深度理解的需求。
why_it_matters_en: The release of GLM-5.2 addresses the need for long-horizon tasks by improving model performance on complex tasks over extended periods, fulfilling practical demands for continuity and deep understanding.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 超越并行采样：智能搜索的多样化查询初始化
title_en: Beyond Parallel Sampling: Diverse Query Initialization for Agentic Search
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种名为DivInit的方法，用于智能搜索中的查询初始化，通过在首次查询时选取多样化的种子查询，解决了标准并行采样中查询冗余导致的性能瓶颈。实验证明，DivInit在五个开源模型和八个基准测试中均优于传统方法，在多跳问答任务中平均提升了5到7分。该方法无需额外训练，代码已开源。
summary_en: The paper introduces DivInit, a training-free method for diverse query initialization in agentic search. It addresses the issue of query redundancy in standard parallel sampling by selecting diverse seed queries at the first turn. Experiments across five open-weight models and eight benchmarks show consistent improvements, including average gains of 5 to 7 points on multi-hop QA tasks at similar compute costs. The code is publicly available.
why_it_matters_zh: 标准并行采样在首次查询时产生重复信息，导致检索和推理效率下降。DivInit通过确保首次查询多样化，减少冗余，提高了检索的广度和质量，从而提升整体搜索性能。
why_it_matters_en: Standard parallel sampling often issues similar first queries, causing redundant evidence retrieval and limiting performance gains. DivInit enhances diversity in initial queries, reducing overlap and enabling more effective evidence gathering, which improves overall agentic search effectiveness.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Beyond Parallel Sampling: Diverse Query Initialization for Agentic Search. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 规则如何自我学习：一种用于法律案例检索的自我进化智能体
title_en: When Rules Learn: A Self-Evolving Agent for Legal Case Retrieval
summary_zh: 法律案例检索因法律语言的复杂性及查询与案例间精确词汇对齐的需求而具有挑战性。尽管密集检索模型取得进展，研究表明BM25依旧是强有力的基线。本文提出了一个无需参数训练的自我进化规则驱动查询重写框架，基于大型语言模型（LLM）创建并验证重写规则，通过实验反馈迭代优化规则。该方法在中文法律案例检索基准LeCaRD-v2上优于非进化基线，特别是在高性能LLM支持下。分析表明，LLM利用历史实验和规则淘汰知识在规则集精炼中起关键作用。
summary_en: Legal case retrieval is challenging due to complex legal language and the need for precise lexical alignment between queries and relevant cases. While dense retrieval models have made progress, BM25 remains a strong baseline. This work proposes a self-evolving, rule-driven query rewriting framework that enhances BM25 without parameter training. An LLM-based agent iteratively generates rewriting rules, plans validation experiments on rule combinations, and removes ineffective rules using historical feedback. Evaluated on the Chinese legal case retrieval benchmark LeCaRD-v2, the approach outperforms non-evolutionary baselines, especially when using a high-capacity core LLM. Analysis reveals that the LLM's ability to leverage previous results and intrinsic knowledge of rule elimination are key to refining the rules through self-evolution.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究创新性地结合了规则驱动和大语言模型，提出无需训练参数即可自我进化的框架，有效提升了法律检索性能。它证明了使用LLM进行规则生成和淘汰的可行性和优势，为法律AI检索领域带来了新的思路。
why_it_matters_en: This work innovatively combines rule-driven methods with large language models, proposing a parameter-free self-evolving framework that effectively improves legal retrieval performance. It demonstrates the feasibility and benefits of using LLMs for rule generation and elimination, offering new insights for AI in legal information retrieval.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: When Rules Learn: A Self-Evolving Agent for Legal Case Retrieval. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: SkillChain-Gym：面向生产中断下再技能培训感知的生产库存控制基准
title_en: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions
summary_zh: 本文介绍了SkillChain-Gym，这是一个针对再技能培训感知的生产库存控制的基准环境，涵盖了员工技能状态动态、技能证书硬性阈值、遗忘机制以及受限于生产时间预算的培训行动。该基准包括多种中断场景和可行性模式，提供全面的运营、韧性和技能增长评估。评测显示，具备培训能力的策略优于仅生产策略，维护培训在遗忘情形下尤为必要。不同策略在不同运行环境中的表现各异，强调需基于预测动态调整技能保险策略。
summary_en: This paper introduces SkillChain-Gym, a benchmark environment for reskilling-aware production-inventory control that models worker skill dynamics, certification thresholds, forgetting, and training actions constrained by the same time budget as production. It incorporates controlled disruption scenarios, multiple feasibility modes, and metrics capturing operations, resilience, and capability growth. Evaluation of various policies shows training-capable ones outperform production-only baselines, with maintenance training necessary even without disruptions. Policy performance varies by regime, highlighting the need for forecast-driven controllers to balance skill insurance and reactive training.
why_it_matters_zh: 当前生产计划越来越需要将员工技能作为决策变量，而现有基准多忽视这一点。SkillChain-Gym通过综合考虑技能维持、遗忘和培训投入，为算法评测提供了更真实和可重用的平台，有助推动生产与人力资源联动优化研究。
why_it_matters_en: As workforce skills become critical in production planning, existing benchmarks often treat labor as exogenous. SkillChain-Gym addresses this gap by modeling skill dynamics and training under disruptions, offering a realistic and reusable testbed that fosters research integrating production control and workforce reskilling.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: SkillChain-Gym: A Benchmark for Reskilling-Aware Production-Inventory Control under Disruptions. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: MemSlides：一种用于个性化幻灯片生成的分层记忆驱动代理框架，支持多轮局部修订
title_en: MemSlides: A Hierarchical Memory Driven Agent Framework for Personalized Slide Generation with Multi-turn Local Revision
summary_zh: 个性化演示文稿生成不仅需要基于当前提示或模板，还需维持用户偏好稳定，保留修改中的新偏好和约束，并可靠执行局部编辑。MemSlides提出了分层记忆框架，将长期记忆分为用户档案记忆和工具记忆，工作记忆承载多轮修改中的活跃偏好与约束。同时结合局部幻灯片修订，仅针对受影响区域进行更新，避免整组重生成。实验表明用户档案记忆提升多角色多意图匹配中的个性化准确度，工具记忆增强闭环修改行为，工作记忆支持偏好延续，体现出分离持久档案、会话工作记忆与执行经验对个性化演示生成的重要性。
summary_en: Personalized presentation generation requires more than responding to current prompts or templates; agents must maintain stable user preferences across tasks, retain newly introduced constraints during multi-turn revisions, and perform reliable local edits. MemSlides proposes a hierarchical memory framework separating long-term memory into user profile memory and tool memory, while working memory manages active preferences and session constraints. Combined with scoped slide-local revisions that target minimal affected areas rather than regenerating entire decks, experiments show improved persona alignment, enhanced closed-loop modification behavior, and continuity in user preferences. The approach highlights the importance of separating persistent user profiles, session-level working memory, and reusable execution experience for effective personalized presentation authoring.
why_it_matters_zh: 因为个性化演示文稿生成涉及多轮交互和复杂偏好管理，传统单一记忆结构难以满足需求。MemSlides通过分层记忆设计和局部修订机制，有效支持多轮局部修改并保持用户偏好稳定，显著提升了个性化与编辑效率，解决了长期且细粒度个性化表达的难题。
why_it_matters_en: Because personalized presentation generation involves multi-turn interactions and complex preference management, traditional single-memory structures fall short. MemSlides' hierarchical memory design and localized revision mechanism effectively support multi-turn localized edits and maintain stable user preferences, significantly enhancing personalization accuracy and editing efficiency, addressing challenges of long-term and fine-grained personalized content generation.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: MemSlides: A Hierarchical Memory Driven Agent Framework for Personalized Slide Generation with Multi-turn Local Revision. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 评估大型语言模型在会议中的称呼对象、换话时机及下一个发言者预测能力
title_en: Evaluating Large Language Models Abilities for Addressee, Turn-change, and Next Speaker Prediction in Meetings
summary_zh: 本文研究了多模态多人对话中的轮次切换，构建了称呼对象检测、换话预测和下一个发言者预测三个任务的评估框架。实验基于AMI语料库，比较了监督模型、纯文本大型语言模型、多模态大型语言模型（MM-LLM）以及人类表现。结果显示，虽然未在目标领域训练且未使用音频视频信息，LLM在下一个发言者预测上超越了监督模型和人类。MM-LLM在称呼对象和换话预测上优于纯文本LLM，但仍不及人类，表明利用原始音视频信号存在挑战。消融实验表明会话上下文尤其对下一个发言者预测至关重要，且人类与LLM的预测规律相似。频繁换话的时段对双方均难以精准预测。
summary_en: This paper investigates turn-taking in multimodal multi-party conversations, establishing an evaluation framework for addressee detection, turn-change prediction, and next speaker prediction. Using the AMI corpus, the study compares supervised models, text-based LLMs, multimodal LLMs (MM-LLMs), and humans. Despite lacking domain-specific training and audio-visual input, LLMs outperformed supervised models and humans in next speaker prediction. MM-LLMs outperformed text-based LLMs in addressee and turn-change tasks but did not reach human-level performance, highlighting challenges in utilizing raw audio-visual data. Ablation studies showed conversational context is critical, especially for next speaker prediction. Prediction patterns of humans and LLMs were similar, with frequent turn-change intervals posing difficulty for both.
why_it_matters_zh: 这项研究展示了大型语言模型在多轮对话中的强大预测能力，尤其是未依赖音视频信息仍能超越人类表现，表明其潜力巨大。同时，多模态模型在综合利用多源信息上尚有提升空间，提示未来研究方向。理解对话中轮次切换对智能会议助手等应用至关重要。
why_it_matters_en: This study demonstrates the strong predictive abilities of large language models in multi-turn conversations, notably surpassing human performance without audio-visual input, indicating great potential. Meanwhile, multimodal models show room for improvement in integrating diverse data, pointing to future research avenues. Understanding turn-taking in dialogue is crucial for intelligent meeting assistants and related applications.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Evaluating Large Language Models Abilities for Addressee, Turn-change, and Next Speaker Prediction in Meetings. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: ConSA：通过可学习分配实现混合注意力的可控稀疏性
title_en: ConSA: Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention via Learnable Allocation
summary_zh: 本文提出了ConSA框架，针对混合全注意力(FA)与滑动窗口注意力(SWA)的模型架构，采用L0正则化自动学习FA和SWA的最佳分配，满足用户指定的稀疏性目标。该方法在0.6B和1.7B规模的大语言模型上优于基于规则的分配策略，KV-head级别的分配效果优于层级分配。学习到的分配模式是在底层使用SWA，中间层连续块使用FA，显示了不同于规则方法的注意力行为特征，结果跨模型规模和稀疏度均表现稳定。
summary_en: This paper introduces ConSA, a framework that learns optimal allocation between full attention (FA) and sliding-window attention (SWA) under user-specified sparsity using L0 regularization. Evaluated on 0.6B and 1.7B scale LLMs, learned allocations outperform rule-based baselines, with KV-head-wise assignment exceeding layer-wise. The learned patterns allocate SWA to lower layers and FA in contiguous middle layers, diverging from evenly interleaved patterns, demonstrating consistent intrinsic attention behaviors across model scales and sparsity levels.
why_it_matters_zh: ConSA通过自动学习FA和SWA的分配，解决了传统基于规则的限制，提升了模型推理效率和性能，对设计高效混合注意力机制提供了重要参考。
why_it_matters_en: ConSA addresses limitations of handcrafted or heuristic FA/SWA allocation by learning optimal sparse attention assignment, improving inference efficiency and effectiveness, offering valuable insights for designing efficient hybrid attention mechanisms.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: ConSA: Controllable Sparsity in Hybrid Attention via Learnable Allocation. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 通过模拟部署预测模型表现
title_en: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
summary_zh: OpenAI推出了部署模拟方法，利用真实对话数据在模型部署前预测其行为，从而提升安全性和评估准确性。
summary_en: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.
why_it_matters_zh: 该方法帮助开发者在模型正式上线前了解其潜在表现和风险，提升了模型的安全性和可靠性。
why_it_matters_en: This approach helps developers understand potential behaviors and risks before the model goes live, enhancing its safety and reliability.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

why_it_matters_en: By establishing the Partner Network, OpenAI aims to support more enterprises in rapidly adopting AI technologies to drive business innovation and growth.

title_zh: 新一代职场的OpenAI学院课程
title_en: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
summary_zh: OpenAI推出三门学院课程，帮助人们建立实用的AI技能，打造可重复的工作流程，并在日常工作中应用智能代理。
summary_en: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
why_it_matters_zh: 这些课程旨在提升职场人员的AI能力，使其更有效率地利用AI技术，适应未来工作需求。
why_it_matters_en: These courses aim to enhance workplace AI skills so people can use AI technology more efficiently and adapt to future work demands.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
